scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all:ci: npm --prefix backend ci --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend ci --include=dev
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:render: npm run install:all:ci && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build && npm start --prefix backend
scripts.start:unified: npm run install:all && npm run build && npm start --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
